recommendations.title: Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: Frustrated with babysitting on yet another weekend night, Sarah, a teenager with an active imagination, summons the Goblins to take her baby stepbrother away. When little Toby actually disappears, Sarah must follow him into a fantastical world to res

recommendations.title: The Indian in the Cupboard
recommendations.overview: A nine-year-old boy gets a plastic Indian and a cupboard for his birthday and finds himself involved in adventure when the Indian comes to life and befriends him.

recommendations.title: Death at a Funeral
recommendations.overview: A myriad of outrageous calamities befalls an eccentric English clan with more than a few skeletons in its closets when the family's patriarch dies an unexpected death.

recommendations.title: In & Out
recommendations.overview: A midwestern teacher questions his sexuality after a former student makes a comment about him at the Academy Awards.

recommendations.title: The Great Muppet Caper
recommendations.overview: Kermit and Fozzie are newspaper reporters sent to London to interview Lady Holiday, a wealthy fashion designer whose priceless diamond necklace is stolen. Kermit meets and falls in love with her secretary, Miss Piggy. The jewel thieves strike again,

recommendations.title: Housesitter
recommendations.overview: Con artist Gwen moves into Newton's empty home without his knowledge and begins setting up house, posing as his new wife.

recommendations.title: The Score
recommendations.overview: An aging thief hopes to retire and live off his ill-gotten wealth when a young kid convinces him into doing one last heist.

recommendations.title: A Muppet Family Christmas
recommendations.overview: Fozzie Bear surprises his mother on Christmas Eve by bringing the entire Muppet gang to her farm to celebrate the holidays. Doc and his dog Sprocket, who had planned a quiet Christmas, end up joining the Muppets in their holiday activities and prepar

recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.overview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.

recommendations.title: The Stepford Wives
recommendations.overview: What does it take to become a Stepford wife, a woman perfect beyond belief? Ask the Stepford husbands, who've created this high-tech, terrifying little town.
